subject: fix(icon): remove white background for transparent icon on all themes
body:
White background showed as a visible box on dark themes. Removed the
background rect so the 4 colored squares float on transparent, matching
any theme combo cleanly in the navbar and browser tab.

Tags: icon, branding, fix
